query: ¿Cuál fue la venta más grande del mes?
expected_sql: SELECT order_id, amount, currency FROM aura_gold.fct_sales WHERE toYYYYMM(created_at) = toYYYYMM(now()) AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 1

query: ¿Cuáles son las ventas totales por moneda este año?
expected_sql: SELECT currency, sum(amount) as total_ventas FROM aura_gold.fct_sales WHERE toYear(created_at) = toYear(now()) AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY currency
